name: indigold
description: Indigold — local-first Personal Intelligence OS as a Render multi-service platform.

scripts.install:all: for d in apps/api apps/worker apps/scheduler services/radian services/encompass apps/pwa; do echo "== install $d =="; (cd "$d" && npm install) || exit 1; done
scripts.build:all: for d in apps/api apps/worker apps/scheduler services/radian services/encompass apps/pwa; do echo "== build $d =="; (cd "$d" && npm run build) || exit 1; done
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && (cd apps/pwa && npm run typecheck)
